name: ml-odyssey-skills
description: Skills migrated to ProjectMnemosyne for cross-project reuse
author: ML Odyssey Team

skills.name: verify-issue-before-work
skills.description: Verify GitHub issue state and existing implementation before starting work to avoid duplicate effort

skills.name: fix-implicitlycopyable-removal
skills.description: Systematic approach to removing ImplicitlyCopyable trait from Mojo structs and fixing resulting compilation errors

skills.name: fixme-todo-cleanup
skills.description: Systematic FIXME/TODO cleanup workflow with proper branching, PRs, and CI handling

skills.name: resolve-mojo-rebase-conflict
skills.description: Resolve git rebase conflicts in Mojo test files where incoming commits used invalid Python syntax; replace with valid Mojo Bool-flag order-agnostic assertion pattern

skills.name: gh-deduplicate-issues
skills.description: Close duplicate GitHub issues in bulk, keeping oldest as canonical survivor, using gh CLI comment+close pattern
